title: Airtable Field
description: An Airtable field represents a column in a table, defining the data type, validation rules, and display configuration for values stored in that column.

id.description: The unique identifier for the field. Field IDs always start with the 'fld' prefix.

name.description: The display name of the field.

type.description: The data type of the field, which determines what values can be stored and how they are displayed.

description.description: An optional description of the field.

options.description: Configuration options specific to the field type. For example, singleSelect fields have a choices array, number fields have a precision setting, and linked record fields specify the linked table.
